default.question: Do I need to make an appointment?
default.answer: Appointments are recommended so we can give your pet our full attention, but we also welcome same-day and walk-in urgent cases.

default.question: What areas of care do you offer?
default.answer: From routine wellness exams and vaccinations to dental, surgery, diagnostics, and emergency care — all under one roof.

default.question: How much will my visit cost?
default.answer: We provide transparent, upfront pricing before any treatment. No surprise fees, ever.

default.question: Is the clinic anxious-pet friendly?
default.answer: Yes. Our fear-free approach and calm environment are designed to keep nervous pets comfortable.
